name: autodj-frontend
description: Build pipeline + JS unit tests + Playwright audits for the AutoDJ web UI.  `npm run build` minifies app.js + app.css and copies worklets / HTML into src/autodj/static_dist/; the Python server prefers static_dist when present so a built deployment serves smaller assets.  `npm test` runs the vitest unit suite.  Audit scripts drive Chromium / Firefox / WebKit against a running AutoDJ server.

scripts.lint: eslint src/autodj/static tests/jsmodules tests/playwright vite.config.js eslint.config.js
